CORRECTION: Previous AUC=0.986 was from a SINGLE LUCKY SEED. Honest multi-seed average is ~0.93.

previous_claimed.note: This was from ONE specific seed with 2-layer GRU. NOT reproducible as average.

verdict: FusionMind BEATS GPT-2 (0.840) and RF (0.832) and HDL (0.780) but does NOT beat CCNN (0.974). Best seed (0.955) is competitive but not SOTA. With only 26 test disrupted, variance is very high.
root_cause_of_error: Cherry-picked seed + small test set (26 disrupted). One misclassification = ±4% TPR. AUC swings ±0.04 between seeds.
